summary: Ran backend pytest and frontend Playwright Phase-3 regression on public URL. Real Supabase-backed data flows are working across Home, Explore, Analytics, Compare, Skill Mapping, Categories, and Company Detail; one critical compare share-link runtime crash remains.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking Share comparison link can throw an unhandled clipboard permission error and crash with runtime overlay (NotAllowedError from navigator.clipboard.writeText).

integration_issues.issue: Clipboard write is not guarded with try/catch; denied permission bubbles to page error overlay instead of graceful fallback state.

action_items: Wrap compare share-link clipboard call in try/catch and show non-crashing fallback message if permission is denied.
Re-run compare share-link flow after fix to ensure no runtime overlay and share state is surfaced properly.
critical_code_review_comments: ComparePage directly awaits navigator.clipboard.writeText without permission/error handling; this is a single-click crash path in restricted clipboard contexts.
Frontend Supabase client initialization does not fail-fast when REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL or REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are missing; consider explicit guard for safer deployment diagnostics.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Auth is not enabled; no credentialed auth flows were required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://talent-compass-52.preview.emergentagent.com. Confirmed: dataset status db flags true, Explore filtering + CSV export, Analytics drill-down + saved presets + faculty briefing export, Compare deep-link + comparison export + workspace save, Skill Mapping result generation, Company Detail Supabase load + guided navigation, service worker registration present. Remaining blocker is compare share-link clipboard crash.
rca of the issue: Repro: open /compare?c1=7&c2=8 (or select any two companies) -> click Share comparison link. Result: PAGE ERROR 'Failed to execute writeText on Clipboard: Write permission denied' and runtime error overlay. Root cause: unhandled navigator.clipboard.writeText rejection in ComparePage. Mitigation: wrap clipboard call in try/catch, gate with permission checks or secure-context fallback, and set a user-friendly status message when copy is blocked.
